title: Domain Physics Schema V1
description: JSON Schema for Project Lumina Domain Physics documents (derived from YAML source).

id.description: Globally unique domain identifier. Format: domain/{org}/{name}/v{major}

domain_authority.description: The human Domain Authority who authored this domain pack

meta_authority_id.description: ID of the domain pack one level above, or 'root' for top-level packs

lumina_core_version.description: Version of lumina-core-v1 this pack targets

invariants.description: List of domain invariants. Must include at least one critical invariant.

standing_orders.description: List of bounded automated responses the orchestrator may take

escalation_triggers.description: Conditions that cause the system to escalate to the Meta Authority

artifacts.description: Mastery artifacts that can be earned in this domain

evidence_summary_types.description: List of evidence summary types produced in this domain

tool_adapters.description: List of tool adapter IDs available in this domain

id.description: Unique identifier for this invariant within the domain

severity.description: critical: halts autonomous action; warning: triggers a standing order

check.description: Description or reference of how this invariant is checked

standing_order_on_violation.description: ID of the standing order to invoke when this invariant is violated

signal_type.description: Optional signal type emitted when this invariant fires (e.g., NOVEL_PATTERN)

id.description: Unique identifier for this standing order

action.description: The automated action taken (e.g., zpd_scaffold, request_more_steps)

trigger_condition.description: Invariant ID or drift condition that activates this order

max_attempts.description: Maximum times this order may be applied before escalation

escalation_on_exhaust.description: Whether to escalate when max_attempts is reached

description.description: Human-readable description of what this standing order does

target_role.description: Role of the Meta Authority receiving this escalation

sla_minutes.description: SLA for acknowledgement in minutes; breach is itself a reportable event

unlock_condition.description: Description of mastery conditions required to earn this artifact

skills_required.description: Skill IDs that must meet the mastery threshold

min_challenge.description: Lower bound of the ZPD band (0..1)

max_challenge.description: Upper bound of the ZPD band (0..1)

drift_window_turns.description: Rolling window size (in turns) for drift calculation

minor_drift_threshold.description: Fraction of window turns outside ZPD that triggers minor drift (0..1)

major_drift_threshold.description: Fraction of window turns outside ZPD that triggers major drift (0..1)

persistence_required.description: Consecutive turns outside ZPD required before drift is flagged
